title: Actually Playable Pack
description: Tweaks and improvements to the default textures.
body:
A collection of many tweaks and additions I have made to the default textures over the years can be found here. Some examples would be colored Axolotyls, visible Suspicious Stew effects, semi-transparent burning UI, higher banner resolution on shields and many more.

This is a hobby project of mine so it sometimes takes me a while to update it to new versions.

![Custom Names](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LywzcKxq/images/60f8eb99bfa705b32f7a8d2d59d1d7aed74d84e1.png)

![Emissive Ore Borders](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LywzcKxq/images/9c419e2f55fb257c09e579db3445788199ee8ea2.png)

I haven't been able to find anything similar to the **Prior Work Penalty** (number of times an item has went through an anvil) feature on anywhere else. I have only ever seen it on mods or plugins. To use it, simply put any item on an item frame and hold down your SNEAK key, the number of anvil uses will be visible. (Diminished Textures are also visible in the image below)

![Prior Work Penalty & Diminished Textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/LywzcKxq/images/0ec143fe3564801d798958b6edf5d6352673486d.png)

As of 1.21.5, all of the item textures are fully functional in _Vanilla_. Some block based features such as **Connected Textures** will still require [Optifine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium)&[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) to function.

A full list of features and the changelog can be found as text files inside.

I didn't make a GitHub for this so sadly there isn't a place I can ask for feedback.

I hope you enjoy.
